verdict_reason: The engineering layer carefully preserves the four-tradition reading of moha-kalilam: Shankara as aviveka (non-discrimination, cognitive obstruction); Ramanuja as the impurity of sin generating attachment to small results (ethical-soteriological obstruction); Prabhupada as 'dense forest of delusion'; Mukundananda as 'quagmire of delusion'. The engineering body simplifies toward the operational analog (architecture-meme thicket) without claiming that the verse's referent is architecture-memes. The natural-not-cynical character of nirveda is preserved (the senior DOES read the post, DOES evaluate, sometimes adopts) — this matches both Shankara's reading (nirveda arises naturally from buddhi-purification) and Ramanuja's (renunciation arises spontaneously after the impurity is crossed). No tradition is forced into a position. Pass.
